name: Haselnussmakronen
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a large baking sheet.
2. Beat egg whites until they foam and thicken slightly.
3. Sprinkle sugar over the egg whites and continue to beat until
the whites form stiff peaks.
4. Combine the remaining ingredients in a bowl and gently but thoroughly fold the mixture into the whites using an over-and-under cutting motion with a rubber spatula.
5. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto the prepared baking sheet, about an inch apart.
6. Let the cookies rest at room temperature for 1 hour before baking.
7. Preheat the oven to 300°C (540°F). Bake the cookies in the middle of the oven for 30 minutes or until they are firm.
8. Carefully transfer the cookies to a cake rack to cool.
9. Store them in tightly sealed jars or tins for several weeks.
